name: apsal-studio
description: Create and validate open, modular photography-protocol packages from an offline DNA catalog and export Codex Skills.

interface.shortDescription: 用开放 DNA 生成摄影主题 JSON 和 Skill
interface.longDescription: APSAL Studio bundles the APSAL Open Protocol, offline photography DNA catalog, modular-package validator, deterministic compiler, and reproducible Codex Skill packager.
interface.defaultPrompt: 使用 APSAL Studio，根据我的创意生成一套详细、可验证的摄影场景 JSON，并打包成 Codex Skill。
